CommunityApplications.Profile: Self-hosted AI workspace - chat, agents, deep research, documents, email, calendar, and model Cookbook. Built by pewdiepie-archdaemon. This repository provides the main Odysseus app, a standalone ChromaDB vector database template, and the Odysseus-AIO master container for automated full-stack deployment. A docker-compose.yml is also available for stack deployment via the Compose Manager plugin.
